submitCorrectEvidence(address,bytes32,by.notice: Submits correct evidence for attention test

validChallengers(uint256).notice: Array of valid challengers (index 0 is reserved for "not found")

AttentionTriggered(address,address).notice: Emitted when attention test is triggered

BondRefunded(address,address,uint256).notice: Emitted when bonded amount is refunded through claim resolution

ChallengerStaked(address,uint256).notice: Emitted when a challenger stakes ETH

CorrectEvidenceSubmitted(address,address.notice: Emitted when correct evidence is submitted

AttentionTestNotExists().notice: Error thrown when attention test does not exist

ChallengerNotExists().notice: Error thrown when challenger does not exist

EvidenceAlreadySubmitted().notice: Error thrown when evidence has already been submitted

EvidenceSubmissionExpired().notice: Error thrown when evidence submission period has expired

InsufficientStakingAmount().notice: Error thrown when insufficient staking amount

InvalidChallengerAddress().notice: Error thrown when caller is not the correct challenger

NoValidChallengers().notice: Error thrown when there are no valid challengers available

NotDisputeGameFactory().notice: Error thrown when caller is not the DisputeGameFactory

NotRatManager().notice: Error thrown when caller is not the ratManager

ProofVerificationFailed().notice: Error thrown when proof verification fails

ProxyAdminOwnedBase_NotProxyAdmin().notice: Thrown when the caller is not the ProxyAdmin.

ProxyAdminOwnedBase_NotProxyAdminOrProxy.notice: Thrown when the caller is not the ProxyAdmin owner or the ProxyAdmin.

ProxyAdminOwnedBase_NotProxyAdminOwner().notice: Thrown when the caller is not the ProxyAdmin owner.

ProxyAdminOwnedBase_NotResolvedDelegateP.notice: Thrown when the current contract is not a ResolvedDelegateProxy.

ProxyAdminOwnedBase_NotSharedProxyAdminO.notice: Thrown when the ProxyAdmin owner of the current contract is not the same as the         ProxyAdmin owner of the other Proxy address provided.

ProxyAdminOwnedBase_ProxyAdminNotFound().notice: Thrown when the ProxyAdmin owner of the current contract is not found.

ReinitializableBase_ZeroInitVersion().notice: Thrown when the initialization version is zero.
